# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: users-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: users.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: users
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - users
    - users.default.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: users.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: orders-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: orders.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: orders
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - orders
    - orders.default.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: orders.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 80
---

    - payments

              number: 80

kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: frontend-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - frontend
    - frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 80
